summary: Backend-only testing for PDF long description fix. All 8 tests PASSED. The fix for LayoutError when descriptions exceed 1800 chars is working correctly. DEV-2026-0027 (with 2123 and 1656 char descriptions) now generates PDF successfully.
critical_code_review_comments: The fix in /app/backend/routes/invoices.py lines 340-386 correctly splits long descriptions (>1800 chars) into multiple table rows
Uses LongTable with splitByRow=1 and repeatRows=1 for proper page breaks
Description chunks are split at newlines or spaces to avoid breaking words
seed_data_creation: Created 2 new test devis with long descriptions (2000+ chars) during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: PDF generation fix for long descriptions is verified working. DEV-2026-0027 with 2123 and 1656 char descriptions generates PDF successfully (25408 bytes). Cloudinary URL generation also works.

verified_features.pdf_generation_long_desc: PASS - DEV-2026-0027 returns HTTP 200 with valid PDF
verified_features.description_splitting: PASS - Descriptions >1800 chars split into multiple rows
